title: StudioDash FAQ
description: Answers to common StudioDash questions about availability, platforms, integrations, analytics, and roadmap items.
summary: Common questions about StudioDash, its development status, target platforms, documented integrations, and roadmap language.

sections.heading: Quick answers
paragraphs: This FAQ summarises the main public StudioDash questions. The product is currently in development, so the wording below avoids treating roadmap or placeholder coverage as released functionality.

faq.question: What is StudioDash?
faq.answer: StudioDash is a Mac and iPad dashboard for indie app and game developers. It brings revenue, app status, website analytics, provider health, sync status, and trends into one workspace.

faq.question: Who is StudioDash for?
faq.answer: StudioDash is designed for solo developers, small studios, and creators managing apps, games, websites, advertising, and product operations.

faq.question: Is StudioDash available now?
faq.answer: StudioDash is currently marked as In Development on the BarkinMad Studios website. Public availability and beta details will be announced when they are ready.

faq.question: Which platforms are planned?
faq.answer: StudioDash is documented as a Mac and iPad dashboard.

faq.question: Which integrations are documented?
faq.answer: Current documentation covers App Store Connect, AdMob, AdSense, Cloudflare, Google Search Console, Google Ads placeholder coverage, and GitHub placeholder coverage.

faq.question: Are all documented integrations live?
faq.answer: No. The documentation distinguishes implemented coverage from placeholder and roadmap items. Placeholder integrations should not be read as live provider reporting.

faq.question: Does StudioDash replace provider dashboards?
faq.answer: No. StudioDash is intended to provide a unified operating view, while provider dashboards remain the source for provider-specific account management and deeper administration.
